overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The video shows continuous movement along sidewalks and across streets in a futuristic urban environment with holographic advertisements, wet reflective pavement, and scattered pedestrians. This is game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring the Night City setting with heavy neon lighting and futuristic architecture.

events.description: character in vest passes close to camera on the right
slight turn to avoid pedestrian walking toward camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to metal construction barricades with neon-lit buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera on the sidewalk
green futuristic car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal crowd control barriers with red and white stripes topped with barbed wire
illuminated red sign reading ROAD CLOSED attached to the barricade
tall vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements on building facade
tall street lamp with multiple fixtures illuminating the sidewalk
reflective wet concrete sidewalk surface mirroring the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a cyberpunk city sidewalk at night. Metal construction barricades line the right side with illuminated 'ROAD CLOSED' signs, while the street with sparse vehicle traffic runs along the left. Tall buildings covered in vertical neon billboards rise ahead, their colorful light reflecting off the wet pavement. Pedestrians occasionally pass by, including one character who walks close to the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with vehicle traffic and crossing

events.description: exits covered sidewalk area and steps onto street crosswalk
futuristic silver sedan and off-road vehicle pass through the intersection
completes crossing and turns left to follow the sidewalk along the orange building

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and turning left to proceed along the new sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection from right to left
beige off-road vehicle waiting at the intersection before proceeding

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt street
large horizontal digital billboard displaying CIRNUS advertisement in blue and red
distinctive orange and gray industrial building with multiple levels and external staircases

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the barricaded sidewalk and enters a wide urban intersection, crossing the asphalt street. Futuristic vehicles including a silver sedan and beige off-road truck pass through the intersection. The camera turns left to follow a new sidewalk adjacent to a distinctive orange industrial building with external staircases. A large blue digital billboard advertising 'CIRNUS' is visible across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with street vendor stall and construction workers

events.description: passing street food vendor stall with yellow umbrella and scattered debris
passing close to construction workers sitting on building steps

agents.ego_description: walking past a street vendor area where construction workers are resting on steps near a food stall

notable_agents.action: construction worker in red vest and blue hard hat sitting on building steps
vendor standing near yellow umbrella food stall with handwritten sign

entered.detail: street vendor stall with large yellow umbrella and wooden counter
group of workers in safety vests resting on concrete steps
scattered trash bags and construction debris along the building edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk adjacent to the orange industrial building, the camera passes a street food vendor stall with a prominent yellow umbrella. Construction workers in red safety vests rest on the building steps to the left, near piles of debris and trash bags. The environment feels more lived-in and gritty compared to the previous intersection, with handwritten signage and scattered objects on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian thoroughfare with overhead holographic advertisements

events.description: enters wider pedestrian plaza area with large overhead digital displays
approaches crosswalk and begins crossing the final intersection

agents.ego_description: walking down a wide pedestrian street lined with massive overhead billboards, then crossing the final intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink top and dark pants walking toward camera with arms crossed
two pedestrians standing near a building entrance with green neon lighting

entered.detail: broad tiled pedestrian walkway with ample space and overhead structures
massive horizontal digital billboard spanning across the street displaying advertisements
green glowing holographic projection on building facade showing product advertisement
pedestrian crosswalk markings at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide pedestrian thoroughfare with massive overhead digital billboards and holographic advertisements projecting from building facades. The camera passes a pedestrian in a pink shirt before approaching a final intersection. Green holographic advertisements glow on the left side of the street as the camera continues forward and begins crossing the street at the crosswalk, with sparse vehicle traffic visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk district, transitioning from a restricted construction zone into a gritty industrial alley and finally into a sprawling commercial thoroughfare. It begins on a sidewalk lined with illuminated road-closed barricades, moving past towering vertical billboards that cast colorful reflections across the wet pavement. As the camera leaves the barricades and crosses a wide intersection filled with futuristic vehicles, the scene shifts toward a more industrial atmosphere adjacent to an orange building with external staircases and a large blue digital advertisement. The path then leads past a yellow-umbrellaed food stall and workers resting amidst urban debris, before the environment opens up into a massive pedestrian plaza dominated by overhead holographic projections. Finally, the camera passes a pedestrian in pink and moves toward a final crosswalk, guided by glowing green advertisements as it enters the flow of street traffic.
